scripts.infra:restart:all-lite: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart api mcp-server minio neo4j postgres qdrant redis temporal temporal-ui
scripts.infra:restart:api: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart api
scripts.infra:restart:embedding: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart worker-embedding
scripts.infra:restart:mcp-server: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart mcp-server
scripts.infra:restart:kali: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart mcp-server-kali
scripts.infra:restart:postgres: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart postgres
scripts.infra:restart:redis: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart redis
scripts.infra:restart:minio: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart minio
scripts.infra:restart:qdrant: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart qdrant
scripts.infra:restart:neo4j: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart neo4j
scripts.infra:restart:temporal: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart temporal
scripts.infra:restart:temporal-ui: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml restart temporal-ui
scripts.infra:rebuild:api: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml build api && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf api || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate api
scripts.infra:rebuild:embedding: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml build worker-embedding && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf worker-embedding || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate worker-embedding
scripts.infra:rebuild:mcp-server: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml build mcp-server && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf mcp-server || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate mcp-server
scripts.infra:rebuild:kali: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml build mcp-server-kali && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf mcp-server-kali || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate mcp-server-kali
scripts.infra:rebuild:postgres: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf postgres || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate postgres
scripts.infra:rebuild:redis: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf redis || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate redis
scripts.infra:rebuild:minio: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf minio || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate minio
scripts.infra:rebuild:qdrant: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf qdrant || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate qdrant
scripts.infra:rebuild:neo4j: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf neo4j || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate neo4j
scripts.infra:rebuild:temporal: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf temporal || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate temporal
scripts.infra:rebuild:temporal-ui: docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -sf temporal-ui || true && docker compose --env-file infra/docker/.env -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --force-recreate temporal-ui
scripts.dev: yarn infra:up && yarn dev:api & yarn dev:web
